issues.detail: The skill file does not cover error handling or edge cases.

scenarios.name: nextjs-stream-poem
scenarios.rationale: Response A correctly implements the required API route but misses the useChat hook; Response B implements the client streaming logic but does not use streamText or toDataStreamResponse in the API route.

scenarios.name: multi-step-agent-weather-search
